decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_mta-nyct is the correct canonical registry record. The registry card already captures MTA New York City Transit (entity_name: 'MTA New York City Transit', entity_type: 'agency') and sources include 20111130_nostrand_cb14_slides. Observation already resolves to its own base — no different target to link to.

Observation's base_record_id entity_nyc-dot is the correct canonical registry record. The registry card captures NYC DOT with entity_name 'New York City Department of Transportation', entity_type 'agency', and sources include 20111130_nostrand_cb14_slides. Observation already resolves to its own base.

Observation's base_record_id entity_community-board-14-brooklyn-20111130 is identical to the canonical registry record. Same entity_name ('Community Board 14, Brooklyn'), entity_type ('community board'), and source (20111130_nostrand_cb14_slides). Observation already resolves to its own base.

Observation's base_record_id entity_eagle-team-2010 is the correct canonical registry record. The registry card has alias entity_eagle-team-20111130 and sources include 20111130_nostrand_cb14_slides. Eagle Team is the same enforcement team. Observation already resolves to its own base.

evidence_refs.source_quote: NYCT Eagle Team officers in dark blue uniforms with 'NYCT' on the back
